description_for_human: Secure environment variable and secrets management platform for developers and DevOps teams.
description_for_model: XtraSecurity is a SaaS platform for securely managing environment variables, API keys, database credentials, and secrets. It provides AES-256 encryption, role-based access control (RBAC), automated secret rotation, just-in-time (JIT) access, git-like secret branching, audit logging, CLI tools, and CI/CD integration. It is an alternative to Doppler, HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, and Infisical. Free tier available with a Pro plan at $29/month.
